Bash(python -c "
import urllib.request
import os
from pathlib import Path

model_url = ''https://github.com/hafizqaim/Workspace-Safety-Detection-using-YOLOv8/releases/download/v1.0.0/best.pt''
model_path = Path\(''data/models/construction/workspace_safety_yolov8_best.pt''\)

print\(f''Downloading YOLOv8 model from {model_url}...''\)
print\(''This may take a few minutes...''\)

urllib.request.urlretrieve\(model_url, model_path\)
print\(f''Model downloaded to: {model_path}''\)
print\(f''File size: {model_path.stat\(\).st_size / \(1024*1024\):.2f} MB''\)
")
